Header.Name: triCapitalProject - triCopy - Creates a Copy
Header.Description: To create a copy of the record

Task.TaskLabel: Call triTask - Synchronous - Module Level Business Rules

Task.TaskLabel: Update New triCapitalProject from Start triCapitalProject
Get triTask Template from triCapitalProject Template

Task.TaskLabel: Set New task End Date to Null
Call triCapitalProject - OnChange RPIM or FRPP Flag

Task.TaskLabel: Set New Task Id to Null
Task.Description: Custom Task maps source task template triIdTX into target task template. To fix, we set to null then call triTask module level business rules to assign new number

Task.TaskLabel: Update New triCapitalProjectTemplate from Start triCapitalProjectTemplate
